title: Ghruom’s Vendetta
bodyText: [[ghruom]] vowed to find [[root-darkpass|Root]]'s killer (S22–23). The party deflected the accusations with words — but [[pc-felson|Felson]]'s shadow-stalker disguise, the fireball hole in the manor, and [[eira-cavernborn|Eira]]'s obliteration all left impressions. A patient fuse under everything the party built in [[koviz]] (F & B, [[pc-brolin|Brolin]]'s sainthood).
